title: Position interpolation smoothing (prevPosition/position/partialTick) + short-life bullet forced full sync
reference_files: C:/Users/GGxia/Desktop/YanbweMod/ModularShoot/设计文档.md#L1242-1243 (Position interpolation: prevPosition/position by partialTick for smooth high-speed rendering)
C:/Users/GGxia/Desktop/YanbweMod/ModularShoot/设计文档.md#L1253-1254 (Short-life bullet guarantee: creation tick end forced full sync, at least one render frame)
acceptance_criteria: Interpolation utility method: lerpPosition(Vec3 prev, Vec3 current, float partialTick) returns interpolated Vec3
BulletRenderManager.updatePosition() stores current position as prevPosition before setting new position (enables interpolation)
Renderers (billboard/3d) call lerpPosition with prevPosition, position, partialTick for smooth visual
Server-side BulletSyncService: at end of each tick, any bullet created AND removed in same tick still gets one full BulletS2CPacket with complete data (forced sync)
Short-life sync: bullet that lives only 1-2 ticks (e.g. shotgun close range) still appears on client for at least one frame
Client receives create packet before destroy packet for short-life bullets (minimal visual residue, avoids invisible bullets)
deliverables: Update to BulletRenderManager (prevPosition tracking on update)
Update to BulletSyncService (forced full sync for short-life bullets at tick end)
